issues.title: Cmd+B sidebar keyboard shortcut not functional in Linux browser environment
issues.description: Pressing Meta+B or Ctrl+B does not toggle sidebar. The sidebar collapse/expand works via button click. This may be a Linux keyboard shortcut mapping issue (Meta key maps differently on Linux).
issues.impact: Minor - button toggle works fine, keyboard shortcut is env-specific

issues.title: Direct URL /settings/feature-flags returns 404
issues.description: The correct route for Feature Flags is /settings/features - not /settings/feature-flags. The tab navigation works correctly. The 404 was from an incorrect direct navigation attempt in testing.
issues.impact: Info - not a user-facing bug, tab navigation works correctly
